title: Emails & Activities google calendar integration

posts.author: Marco.Barbini (Marco Barbini)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Everybody!!!
I’ve seen in the monday official video that in the “mail and activities” when you create meeting in the activities it connects and shows your google calendar.
I’ve connect my google account (in fact I can send, recieve and track emails) but when I create a meeting the calendar that shows up is always empty.
Surley Im doing something wrong, and if someone has been there and solved the problem it will be incredible to here your feedback.
Thanks
M

posts.author: ThreeUnits (Wojciech Dymowski)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have the same problem - I’ve made ticket to support.
Theirs tutorial says, that this feature must working: Emails & Activities | monday.com tutorials - YouTube

posts.author: ThreeUnits (Wojciech Dymowski)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve noticed in Google Chrome Developer Tools console (Network tab), that proces hangs out to try connect with url: https:///crm/calendar/events?connectionId=xxxxxxxx

monday_error1920×979 324 KB

posts.author: IM_Team (Inner Maven)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I talked to support about this today and apparently Emails & Activities view is not connected to the Google Calendar in a way where you can create meeting in both of them. Meeting activity is just a way for you to track contact with someone.

I guess we need votes to get this feature released.
